items.question: Has the centre applied for registration through EMIS or prepared the information required for EMIS onboarding?
items.corrective_action: Prepare a formal registration application, proof of Local Government registration and the EMIS number of the nearest primary school.

items.question: Has the centre applied for licensing through the relevant District, City or Municipal Local Government?
items.corrective_action: Contact the Local Government education office, request the official licensing process and prepare for a compliance assessment.
items.source_label: Standard S20 and ECCE Policy paragraph 63

items.question: Is there a system to track licence validity and prepare for renewal?
items.corrective_action: Create a licence calendar and prepare for periodic renewal.
items.source_label: Standard S23 and ECCE Policy paragraph 33

items.question: Are pre-primary teachers registered and licensed in line with the National Teacher Policy and National Teachers Act requirements?
items.corrective_action: Compile teacher qualification, identification and registration records, then verify requirements with the National Teacher Council process.

items.question: Is the centre ready for routine or unannounced inspection?
items.corrective_action: Keep centre records, safety information, staffing details, learning environment evidence and compliance documents available for inspection.

items.question: Does the centre have a safe way for parents and community members to report concerns?
items.corrective_action: Create a simple complaints and reporting pathway for unsafe environments, unethical behaviour or licensing concerns.

items.question: Can parents verify whether the centre and staff are legitimate and compliant?
items.corrective_action: Work with Local Government to make sure the centre appears in the relevant register and keep teacher/caregiver records available for verification.

items.question: Is the centre clear on whether it provides formal ECCE, non-formal ECCE, day care or pre-primary education?
items.corrective_action: Classify the service correctly because registration, licensing and standards may differ by programme type.
items.source_label: ECCE Policy paragraph 32 and Standard S40
